    • getHelpRepresentation

      public String getHelpRepresentation()
      Return the "help" command representation of this argument. For instance, in a "dialogue" command it looks like this: dialogue [text] name is optional and defaults to "", while text is non optional.
      Specified by:
      getHelpRepresentation in class ArgBase
